description: Canonical registry of Formspec lint rule codes. Tested rules carry a normative spec pointer (specRef) and an imperative repair hint (suggestedFix) that the authoring loop surfaces to LLMs. Draft entries exist so every emitted code is discoverable — fill them in as rules graduate.

rules.title: Cannot determine document type
rules.suggestedFix: add a recognizable Formspec root (`items`, `components`, or `tokens`) so the document type can be detected

rules.title: Schema violation
rules.suggestedFix: align the document with schemas/*.schema.json — fix the flagged property or value

rules.title: Duplicate item key
rules.suggestedFix: rename one of the duplicate item keys — each `key` must be unique within its parent scope

rules.title: Duplicate item full path
rules.suggestedFix: remove the duplicate item at this path, or re-key one instance so full paths are unique

rules.title: Bind target not found
rules.suggestedFix: change bind target to match an item key, or add the missing item to `items`

rules.title: Shape target references unknown item
rules.suggestedFix: point the shape target at an existing item path, or add the referenced item to `items`

rules.title: Undefined option set reference
rules.suggestedFix: define the named option set under `optionSets`, or change the item's `optionSet` reference

rules.title: Incompatible dataType for optionSet
rules.suggestedFix: change dataType to one of string/integer/decimal/choice/multiChoice, or drop the optionSet

rules.title: FEL expression failed to parse
rules.suggestedFix: fix the FEL syntax to match the grammar — check operators, quotes, and path references

rules.title: Dependency cycle
rules.suggestedFix: break the dependency cycle — remove one bind's reference to the other

rules.title: Unresolved extension
rules.suggestedFix: declare the extension in a loaded registry, or remove the extension key

rules.title: Retired extension
rules.suggestedFix: stop using this retired extension — migrate to its replacement or remove the key

rules.title: Deprecated extension
rules.suggestedFix: plan migration away from this deprecated extension before it is retired

rules.title: Invalid color token value
rules.suggestedFix: use a valid CSS color (hex, rgb/rgba, hsl/hsla, or named color) for this color token

rules.title: Invalid size token value
rules.suggestedFix: use a valid CSS length with unit (px, rem, em, %, …) for this size token

rules.title: Invalid font weight token value
rules.suggestedFix: set font weight to a 100-step numeric (100…900) or a recognized keyword (normal, bold, …)

rules.title: Invalid duration or easing token value
rules.suggestedFix: use a valid duration (e.g. `200ms`) or an easing function (`ease-in`, `cubic-bezier(...)`)

rules.title: Unresolved token reference
rules.suggestedFix: define the token in your theme's tokens map, or use an existing token

rules.title: Theme item key not in paired definition
rules.suggestedFix: remove the `items` override, or add an item with this key to the paired definition

rules.title: Page region references unknown item key
rules.suggestedFix: change the region `key` to match an item path in the definition, or add that item

rules.title: Theme targetDefinition.url does not match paired definition
rules.suggestedFix: align `targetDefinition.url` with the definition's `url`, or pair with the correct definition

rules.title: Unknown non-extension token
rules.suggestedFix: rename the token to a known category, or namespace custom tokens under an `x-` prefix

rules.title: No tokens declared
rules.suggestedFix: declare at least one token under `tokens` to give renderers a baseline to cascade from

rules.title: Duplicate page id
rules.suggestedFix: rename one of the duplicate page IDs — each `pages[].id` must be unique

rules.title: Responsive breakpoint references unknown page region
rules.suggestedFix: declare the breakpoint under `theme.breakpoints`, or remove the unused `responsive` entry

rules.title: Component tree root must be a layout component
rules.suggestedFix: wrap the root in a layout component (e.g. `Page`, `Stack`, `Grid`)

rules.title: Unknown built-in component
rules.suggestedFix: use a built-in component type, or define this type in `components` as a custom component

rules.title: Component incompatible with field dataType
rules.suggestedFix: pick a component whose matrix accepts this field's `dataType`, or change the field type

rules.title: Component requires options but field provides none
rules.suggestedFix: add `optionSet` or inline `options` to the bound field, or switch to a component that takes no options

rules.title: Richtext TextInput must bind to string field
rules.suggestedFix: bind richtext `TextInput` to a `string` or `text` field, or drop the richtext variant prop

rules.title: Duplicate bind in component tree
rules.suggestedFix: provide every parameter the custom component declares in its `params`, or remove the instance

rules.title: Custom component reference cycle
rules.suggestedFix: break the custom-component cycle — a component must not transitively reference itself

rules.title: Component bind does not resolve to a field
rules.suggestedFix: point bind at an existing field key, or add that field to the definition

rules.title: Input component missing required bind
rules.suggestedFix: remove `bind` from layout/container components — only input components bind to fields

rules.title: Component compatibility warning (loose match)
rules.suggestedFix: pick a component whose dataType matrix includes this field's type

rules.title: Non-input component has bind
rules.suggestedFix: keep only one editable input bound to each field — move extra inputs to a different field

rules.title: Custom component reference unresolved
rules.suggestedFix: bind each field from at most one place in the component tree — remove the duplicate
